name: Cordyceps
summary: Decision-ready summary: Cordyceps is best framed for fatigue research context; exercise tolerance support; mushroom stack comparison; safety screen: autoimmune disease; anticoagulants; mushroom allergy.
description: Cordyceps supports exercise performance and fatigue resistance, potentially through metabolic/mitochondrial effects and immune modulation; confidence is low.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: known hypersensitivity to cordyceps or other fungi
autoimmune disease such as lupus or rheumatoid arthritis or multiple sclerosis due to immune-stimulating effects
immunosuppressant medications such as cyclosporine or organ transplant anti-rejection drugs due to reduced effectiveness
anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications due to bleeding risk
diabetes medications or insulin due to added hypoglycemia risk
discontinue before scheduled surgery due to bleeding risk
